final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing promotional poster for UGREEN NAS (绿联私有云) brand 618 anniversary celebration e-commerce campaign.

Style/medium: needs a festive e-commerce promotional aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: 
Subject: must include "绿联私有云" brand name and "618周年庆" campaign theme
Scene/backdrop: needs a celebratory campaign atmosphere — exact backdrop treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a festive, high-energy promotional atmosphere — exact lighting mix is yours
Color palette: needs a 618 shopping festival direction — exact color choices are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "绿联私有云" and "618周年庆"
Constraints: must preserve the brand identity of UGREEN NAS, must clearly communicate 618 anniversary sale event
Avoid:
